title: Darkmesh DM1 DNS TXT Envelope (validated)
description: Canonical DM1 DNS TXT envelope used as domain ownership/config pointer.

cfg.description: Arweave tx id with config payload.

kid.description: Owner key id/address expected to match config signature authority.

seq.description: Optional monotonic sequence for anti-rollback enforcement.

x-runtimeRules: Raw TXT parser MUST reject duplicate keys.
Raw TXT parser MUST reject unknown keys.
Domain binding is resolved from _darkmesh.<domain> query context, not from envelope body.
Unknown extension fields are allowed only under x-* namespace.
